summary: Multi-language support for AppTutorial.js tested successfully. Tutorial displays correctly in Marathi (default), English, and Hindi. All 8 slides navigate correctly with proper translations for titles, subtitles, descriptions, tips, and navigation buttons. Fixed ESLint error and skip button z-index issue.

issues: Minor animation timing issue - previous slide content briefly visible during transition (cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality)

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed ESLint error: Removed invalid eslint-disable-next-line comment for non-existent rule 'react-hooks/exhaustive-deps'
Fixed skip button (X) z-index issue: Added z-30 class to ensure button is clickable above mascot element (z-20)
useMemo warning about redundant 'language' dependency is harmless - t already changes when language changes
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing test account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-language tutorial feature fully tested. Tutorial appears after login for first-time users. Language stored in localStorage with key 'paras_language' (values: 'mr', 'hi', 'en'). Tutorial completion stored with key 'tutorial_completed'. To test tutorial again, clear localStorage.removeItem('tutorial_completed') before login.

Marathi_Tutorial_Tests.slide_1_welcome: PASSED - Title: 'Paras Reward मध्ये स्वागत! 🎉', Subtitle: 'तुमचा reward journey सुरू करा'
Marathi_Tutorial_Tests.slide_2_mining: PASSED - Title: 'PRC Mining ⛏️', Tips in Marathi

Hindi_Tutorial_Tests.slide_1_welcome: PASSED - Title: 'Paras Reward में स्वागत! 🎉', Subtitle: 'अपना reward journey शुरू करें'

Tutorial_Functionality_Tests.progress_dots: PASSED - 8 dots visible, active dot highlighted
Tutorial_Functionality_Tests.skip_button: PASSED - X button closes tutorial and sets localStorage
Tutorial_Functionality_Tests.complete_tutorial: PASSED - Clicking through all slides and 'Start' closes tutorial

fixes_applied.issue: ESLint error: Definition for rule 'react-hooks/exhaustive-deps' was not found
fixes_applied.fix: Removed eslint-disable-next-line comment and added 't' to useMemo dependency array

fixes_applied.issue: Skip button (X) not clickable - mascot element intercepting pointer events
fixes_applied.fix: Added z-30 class to skip button to ensure it's above mascot (z-20)
